title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Fluted Cake Pan with Non-Stick Coating, Ideal for Home Baked Bread or Cake centrepieces with Flowing Pattern, Internal Measurement of 22.5 cm Diameter, Grey
features: TRADITIONAL PATTERN: A beautifully shaped fluted Cake Tin, Ideal for a centrepiece for any celebration, handwash recommended
NON-STICK: This Chef Aid decorative cake pan comes with Goldflon non-stick coating for effortless quick and easy release
FAMILY SIZED: With internal measurements of 22.5 cm in diameter this tin will serve 10 to 12 portions of your freshly baked product
VERSITILE: Ideal for baking either bread of cake items and perfect for adding that something extra, measuring 22.5 x 11.5 cm

CHEF AID: The Chef Aid non-stick cookware range is a well-loved and very popular range of 25 products that caters for every individual and offers a complete range of solutions for the home and is perfect for everyday use
